---
title: "indicator_species_analysis"
output: html_document
---

Loading Libraries and Dataset

```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(indicspecies)
library(tidyverse)

ps = readRDS('../Datasets/phyloseq_taxonomy.rds')
```

Rarefication of Data and Applying tax_glom

```{r}
ps_rare = ps %>%
  rarefy_even_depth(sample.size = 87521, rngseed = 123)
ps_genus = tax_glom(ps, 'Genus')
```


```{r}


phyloseq_object = microbiome::transform(ps, 'compositional')

ps_filt = filter_taxa(phyloseq_object, function(x) mean(x) > 0.001, TRUE)

isa_output = multipatt(t(otu_table(phyloseq_object)), 
                       cluster = sample_data(Time_of_Collection_categorical)$dose_categorical,
                       control = how(nperm = 999))

summary(isa_output, indvalcomp = TRUE)

statistics = as.data.frame(isa_output$sign)
```
